partial_boundaries.covered_behavior: IAM policy pressure inside the AWS credential misuse scenario.
partial_boundaries.not_claimed: Trust-policy changes, group membership changes, account creation, or broad account-manipulation coverage.

partial_boundaries.covered_behavior: Endpoint process activity reaching a remote MongoDB service.
partial_boundaries.not_claimed: SMB, RDP, SSH, credential replay, database compromise, or broad lateral movement protocol coverage.

not_claimed: Live paid Datadog or AWS dependency

boundaries: Scenario-tagged active monitors are deterministic lab replay artifacts.
One AWS field-correlation example shows the production-maturation path without increasing the active monitor count.
Sanitized screenshots prove the temporary Datadog lab existed, but no live tenant is required for review.
T1041 and T1562 are documented as not-claimed ATT&CK boundaries, not dashboard coverage.
